title: Flea Treatment in Merrick, NY | $350 - $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Merrick, Long Island. Effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Prices from $350 - $650. Same-day service available.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services to homeowners and businesses throughout Merrick, Long Island. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate flea infestations quickly and safely, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests. With transparent pricing ranging from $350 to $650, we deliver effective solutions tailored to your property's specific needs.
whyUs: As Merrick's trusted flea control experts, we combine advanced treatment techniques with deep knowledge of Long Island's unique pest challenges. Our licensed professionals provide fast, reliable service with guaranteed results, ensuring your home or business remains flea-free year-round.
localContext: Merrick's beautiful tree-lined neighborhoods, proximity to the bay, and abundance of parks like Cammann's Pond and Fraser Park create ideal conditions for flea populations, especially during warmer months. From the charming single-family homes near Merrick Road to the waterfront properties along the South Shore, we've helped countless local residents reclaim their spaces from flea infestations.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Merrick typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly after application. However, complete elimination typically requires 2-3 weeks as eggs and larvae continue to hatch. We often recommend follow-up treatments to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members away from treated areas for 2-4 hours during application and until surfaces are completely dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment service in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand that flea infestations require urgent attention and offer same-day or next-day service to Merrick residents whenever possible. Contact us before noon for potential same-day treatment, and we'll do our best to accommodate your schedule and eliminate your flea problem quickly.
